pr.title: PR #131 â€” Capability Knowledge Graph Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

First graph-ready capability knowledge layer. Unifies the prior seven knowledge layers (registry/timeline/summary/relationship/impact/file/validation) into a single deterministic, append-only set of typed graph **nodes** and **edges**. Structure only â€” no graph DB, query language, visualization, dashboard, auto-discovery, reasoning, or network calls (per non-goals). Upstream layers are consumed read-only; nothing is mutated.

A node references an originating knowledge object by `(node_type, source_id)`; an edge connects two nodes by `node_id`. The engine validates + normalizes types, dedups, orders deterministically, and detects orphans:

```python
# node identity â†’ dedupe; edge identity â†’ dedupe
node_key = (node_type, source_id)                      # keep first, count rest
edge_key = (source_node_id, target_node_id, edge_type) # keep first, count rest

# deterministic ordering
nodes.sort(key=(node_type, source_id, label, node_id))
edges.sort(key=(source_node_id, target_node_id, edge_type, edge_id))

# orphan = node not referenced by any surviving edge endpoint
orphan_node_ids = sorted(n.node_id for n in nodes
                         if n.node_id not in {e.source/e.target for e in edges})

# pass gate
passed = node_count > 0 and duplicate_node_count == 0
         and duplicate_edge_count == 0 and orphan_node_count == 0
```

Node types: `CAPABILITY, EVENT, SUMMARY, RELATIONSHIP, IMPACT, FILE, VALIDATION, ARTIFACT, WORKER, UNKNOWN`.
Edge types: `BUILDS_ON, ENABLES, RELATES_TO, AFFECTS, VALIDATES, TOUCHES_FILE, PRODUCED_EVENT, HAS_SUMMARY, HAS_IMPACT, HAS_ARTIFACT, CREATED_BY, UNKNOWN`.

The report embeds a `CapabilityKnowledgeGraph` (`graph_id`, nodes, edges, `raw_payload`) as the single source of truth and exposes `node_count/edge_count/node_type_counts/edge_type_counts/duplicate_node_count/duplicate_edge_count/orphan_node_count/orphan_node_ids`. Invalid types raise `ValueError`; type values are uppercased; `raw_payload`/`raw_metadata` and `schema_version` are preserved; reports are append-only.

New module `src/axiom_core/capability_knowledge_graph.py` (`CapabilityGraphNode`, `CapabilityGraphEdge`, `CapabilityGraphNodeType`, `CapabilityGraphEdgeType`, `CapabilityKnowledgeGraph`, `CapabilityKnowledgeGraphReport`, `CapabilityKnowledgeGraphEvidence`, `CapabilityKnowledgeGraphEngine`). CLI: `capability-graph-create / capability-graphs / capability-graph-show / capability-graph-export` (JSON/Markdown/CSV). Evidence bundle always written under `artifacts/capability_knowledge_graph/<run_id>/`: `capability_graph_request.json`, `capability_graph_result.json`, `capability_graph_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`. Registered in the command catalog (+ `test_command_registry` coverage set), the test-selection module map, and `.gitignore`.

## Validation

- `poetry run pytest -q` â†’ **4374 passed, 1 skipped** (+55; baseline 4319 at #130)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` â†’ **0 errors**
- CLI smoke (adversarial fixture: 5 nodes incl. one case-insensitive duplicate `(CAPABILITY, cap-131)`, one orphan `EVENT`, edges incl. case-insensitive duplicate `validates`==`VALIDATES`): node_count 4 / dup node 1; edge_count 2 / dup edge 1; orphan_node_count 1 (`["n-9"]`); deterministic node + edge ordering; all 3 export formats; `show missing`â†’exit 2, `export ../../etc`â†’exit 1, invalid edge_typeâ†’exit 1

## Notes
- What did **not** change: no behavior change to any prior framework; this layer only reads their concepts as `(node_type, source_id)` references.
- 2024 Revit baseline unaffected (Python-only, CLI/registry).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
